notes: **Batch 5 hold-out case** — added 2026-05-08 to validate hybrid-v2's 120k threshold WITHOUT retuning. Adds a Go ecosystem timeout_or_oom case (calibration set's nodejs-test-debugger-exec-timeout was JS — this validates the timeout pattern generalizes). repo_visibility=redacted because TestParseURL fixture URLs were redacted (false-positive matches against the audit's url_credential regex; the URLs are public Go test fixtures with placeholder credentials like `redis://:bar@localhost:123` but the audit's fail-closed default forced redaction). flaky_or_transient=true (1.001s timeout on a redis-server publish is timing-sensitive under CI load). signal_position=middle: the ginkgo failure block lives at L1102-1172 of 2730 (~42%) and the package-level FAIL at L1331-1333 (~49%); about half the log is post-failure non-failure-test chatter from other test packages running afterward. log_size_bucket=medium (2730 lines).
